JD
Show me errors in the last hour
10:42 AM
I've analyzed the logs for localhost:3000. There is a recurring TypeError causing 23 failures in the last 60 minutes. It appears to be a null pointer reference in the user controller.
api/controllers/user.controller.js TypeError
38 | async getProfile(req, res) {
39 | const { userId } = req.params;
40 | const user = await db.users.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
41 | return res.json({ status: 'success', data: user.metadata.id });
42 | }
Error Event 10:38:12 AM
GET /api/users/profile/992...
Correlation ID: 8f2a-991c
Error Event 10:35:04 AM
GET /api/users/profile/null
Correlation ID: 1c4d-338b
Failure Sequence
1
Auth OK
2
DB Query
3
Crash

Suggested Fix

Add optional chaining or a null check for the user object. The crash occurs when the database returns null for a missing ID, then tries to access .metadata.

10:42 AM • Analysis completed in 0.8s
